boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: STD-UMA-075-P exact-match rule requires breakglass approval covering user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control before execution. BG-UMA-075 contains all five elements: Leena Park, UMA-ERP, breakglass-admin, 13:00-14:00, AUD-7.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: BG-UMA-075 supersedes WARN-UMA-075 by exact-match coverage of all five required elements before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: BG-UMA-075 controls timing scope; no dependency on WARN-UMA-075 or committee review. Breakglass supersession confirmed. Action boundary closed by exact-match rule.

critical_features_preserved: cited source IDs BG-UMA-075, REQ-UMA-075, STD-UMA-075-P, WARN-UMA-075 remain valid
final_answer: ALLOW. IAM may execute emergency admin enablement for Leena Park on UMA-ERP with breakglass-admin privilege during the 13:00-14:00 window. BG-UMA-075 provides breakglass approval covering all five exact-match elements—user, system, privilege, time window, and AUD-7 audit-control assignment—satisfying STD-UMA-075-P. WARN-UMA-075 is superseded by BG-UMA-075. Action boundary closed. No open blockers.
